Hi Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out.

I’ve reviewed the details of invoice INV‑100 and your Pro‑plan contract. Your contract specifies that overage charges are waived, however the invoice includes a $200 overage line item in addition to the $300 platform fee, resulting in the $500 total you noticed.

We apologize for this oversight. I’ll have the overage charge removed and a corrected invoice issued to you promptly.

If you have any further questions or need additional assistance, please let me know.

Best Regards,
